role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, climate, and agricultural patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific plant species (Rosa canina) and field crops.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road width, shoulder types, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Used camera generation quality and cross-domain regional knowledge.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Denmark. The agents provided solid, image-grounded evidence (flat terrain, specific hedgerows, road width) and the tournament logic was consistent with the specialist inputs.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain and vegetation match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Identification of dog rose and field crops is visually supported.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road width and lack of markings are correctly described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Assessment of image quality and regional style is consistent.
